mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.REGION AS region, B.CATEGORY AS category, B.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, B.REG_DATE AS regDate, B.IMAGE_PATH AS imagePath, M.NAME AS memberName FROM TRV_BOARD B JOIN TRV_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRV_BOARD (BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, REGION, CATEGORY, IMAGE_PATH) VALUES (TRV_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{region}, #{category}, #{imagePath})
mapper.update: UPDATE TRV_BOARD SET VIEW_CNT = VIEW_CNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
